title: Indian-Style Chicken Stir Fry
description: A quick and flavorful Indian-inspired stir fry made with marinated chicken and a blend of spices. Serve over rice or with naan bread.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add chicken and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove chicken from skillet and set aside.
Add sliced onions and bell peppers to skillet and cook until tender, about 3-5 minutes.
Add stir fry sauce and Indian seasoning blend to skillet and stir to combine.
Return chicken to skillet and stir to coat with sauce.
Stir in coconut milk and bring to a simmer.
Reduce heat to low and let sauce simmer for 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
